name: LEGO Classic Creative Bricks Box
tagline: 650 colorful LEGO bricks for endless creative building
description: Classic LEGO bricks in assorted colors. Perfect for creative building projects, display, or teaching kids engineering principles. Includes baseplate and storage box.

name: Kindle Paperwhite E-Reader
tagline: 6-inch display with backlight, waterproof reading device
description: Read thousands of books with a waterproof, anti-glare 6-inch display. Access millions of titles from Amazon. Battery lasts weeks on single charge.

name: FitBit Charge 5 Fitness Tracker
tagline: Advanced fitness tracker with heart rate, sleep & stress monitoring
description: Track workouts, heart rate, sleep quality, and stress levels. AMOLED color display, water resistant up to 50m. 7-day battery life.

name: Instant Pot Duo 7-in-1 Pressure Cooker
tagline: Multi-use pressure cooker: slow cook, pressure cook, sauté, steam, and more
description: Cook meals 30% faster with 7 smart cooking programs. Non-stick pot with easy-seal lid. Perfect for meal prep and quick weeknight dinners.

name: Sony WH-CH720N Wireless Headphones
tagline: Noise-canceling wireless headphones with 35-hour battery
description: Active noise cancellation blocks outside sounds. Touch controls, built-in mic for calls. Ultra-long battery life up to 35 hours.

name: Cra-Z-Art Pottery Cool Studio Deluxe
tagline: Electric pottery wheel for creating clay projects
description: Build your own pottery creations with an electric pottery wheel. Includes clay, sculpting tools, and paint set. Great STEM activity for kids 8+.

name: Anker PowerCore 26800mAh Power Bank
tagline: High-capacity portable charger for multiple devices
description: Charge phones, tablets, and more. Dual USB ports charge 2 devices simultaneously. Fast charging technology with smart chip protection.

name: Melitta Coffee Maker with Grinder
tagline: Integrated grinder and brewer for fresh ground coffee
description: Integrated burr grinder grinds beans right before brewing. Programmable 12-cup brewer. Easy-clean design with removable filter basket.

name: National Geographic Kids Gemstone Dig Kit
tagline: Mine and excavate 12 real gemstones from plaster block
description: Educational STEM activity teaching geology and excavation techniques. Includes real gemstones, chisel, brush, and identification guide.

name: Theragun Elite Massage Gun
tagline: Professional-grade percussion massage for muscle recovery
description: Reduces muscle soreness and improves circulation. 6 attachment heads for targeted relief. Quiet motor with long battery life.

name: Oculus Quest 3 VR Headset
tagline: All-in-one VR headset for gaming and entertainment
description: Next-gen VR gaming with color passthrough. Access 500+ games and experiences. Play standalone or connect to PC for advanced games.

name: Spiderman: Across the Spider-Verse 4K UHD
tagline: Award-winning animated film in 4K Ultra HD Blu-ray
description: Stunning animated superhero adventure in crystal-clear 4K resolution. Bonus features and directors' commentary included.

name: Hydro Flask 32oz Insulated Water Bottle
tagline: Double-wall insulated water bottle keeps drinks cold 24 hours
description: Eco-friendly stainless steel construction. Keeps cold drinks icy for 24 hours or hot drinks warm for 12 hours. Multiple color options.

name: Osmo Creative Genius Tablet Game Set
tagline: Interactive games combining physical pieces with iPad app
description: Learn through creative play with tangram, pizza, and squiggle games. Develops problem-solving and artistic skills. Works with iPad.

name: Beats Studio Pro Wireless Headphones
tagline: Premium noise-canceling headphones with superior sound
description: Industry-leading noise cancellation. Transparency mode to hear surroundings. 40-hour battery life with fast charging.

name: The Midnight Library by Matt Haig (Hardcover)
tagline: Bestselling novel about infinite life possibilities and second chances
description: Award-winning fiction exploring what it means to live a meaningful life. Perfect for thoughtful readers seeking inspiring stories.

name: GoPro HERO12 Action Camera
tagline: 5.3K video, rugged action camera for adventures
description: Waterproof action camera captures stunning 5.3K video. Ideal for sports, travel, and vlogging. Built-in stabilization.

name: Laneige Lip Sleeping Mask Gift Set
tagline: Korean beauty lip care set with multiple flavors
description: Popular overnight lip treatment mask that hydrates and softens lips. Includes 3 different flavors. Paraben-free and cruelty-free.

name: Dyson V15 Detect Cordless Vacuum
tagline: Laser-powered cordless vacuum reveals hidden dust
description: Intelligent laser detects microscopic dust. 60-minute runtime on full charge. Converts to handheld for whole-home cleaning.

name: Ring Video Doorbell Pro 2
tagline: Smart video doorbell with HD video and two-way talk
description: See and speak to visitors remotely. Night vision and motion detection. Works with Alexa for voice notifications.
